consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on task completion with no penalties. Claude reported completion at 248 seconds (4:08) while GPT-4o reported 269 seconds (4:29). Given the 21-second difference and both models citing different frame references, the consensus uses the average timing. Both models confirmed all six objects were successfully transferred without drops or losses.

disagreements.rationale: Both models identified task completion but with different timing endpoints. Without frame-by-frame verification, the conservative approach is to average the reported times.

disagreements.resolution: Recalculated as 41.5 based on consensus timing
